calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Unlawful Detainer
Off Calendar Dec-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gordon Y. Yamamoto, 434-4700, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Yamamoto presented the Court with a valid proof of service. PLAINTIFF KELLEY PRESSMAN'S Motion To Enforce Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment upon Unlawful Detainer was granted. Judgment signed in open Court, but Mr. Yamamoto was advised by the Court to submit a proposed order granting the motion as soon as possible. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Upon Unlawful Detainer
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF KELLEY PRESSMAN'S Motion To Enforce Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Upon Unlawful Detainer is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "Caused to be served" does not show personal knowledge of service. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: GORDON YAMAMOTO FOR PLAINTIFF KELLEY SHEEHY PRESSMAN
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY KERRY DUNNE FOR DEFENDANT RON KINGSLEY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION Of 736 SAN JOSE AVENUE WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 6/30/06. PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE BACK RENT IF DEFENDANT PAYS JUNE RENT TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE SUM OF $1496 TO BE RETURNED. NO JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, BACK RENT, DAILY RENT FROM JULY 1, 2006, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. SO ORDERED.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL (218)
